subcodes.first_line: A glorious Book sent down from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Wise. Verily, it is the Light of God amongst His servants and His remembrance unto all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب کریم نزل من لدن عزیز حکیم انه لنور الله بین عباده و ذکره للعالمین ان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
